## About You

**Role/Title:**


**Team/Company (optional):**


**How many people on your team will use this?**


## Your Use Case

**What are you building with AI agents?**
<!-- Internal tooling, CI/CD automation, code review, customer support, data pipelines, etc. -->


**What models do you currently use or plan to use?**
<!-- Claude, GPT, Gemini, Ollama/local, multiple, etc. -->


**Do you need to run different models for different agent roles?**
<!-- e.g., Opus for planning, Sonnet for code edits, local for sensitive data -->


## Infrastructure

**Where does your code run today?**
<!-- AWS, GCP, Azure, on-prem, hybrid, local dev machines, etc. -->


**Is self-hosted / data sovereignty a requirement?**
<!-- Compliance, security policy, air-gapped, regulated industry, etc. -->


## Pain Points

**What's broken about your current agent setup?**
<!-- Vendor lock-in, no governance, no audit trail, can't mix models, cost, etc. -->
